commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the bundled DeepInfra provider to use auth-aware live model catalogs, adds image/video catalog registration, changes DeepInfra defaults/media wiring, and adds Anthropic cache-control wrapping plus docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +698, Tests +879, Docs +5, Other 0. Total +1582 across 24 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main returns only configured DeepInfra augment entries and uses the OpenRouter cache wrapper despite DeepInfra anthropic cache eligibility; I did not run live DeepInfra credentials in this read-only review.
